Title: Companies Are Burning Millions on AI and Just Now Realizing It
Script: Companies right now are quietly burning through millions of dollars in artificial intelligence costs without even realizing it, and the wake up call is finally here. For the last few years businesses pushed something called tokenmaxxing, where developers were encouraged to use as much artificial intelligence as possible without ever worrying about efficiency or cost. Now major companies are reporting bills ballooning into the billions of dollars, and leaders are finally being forced to rein in their spending. The fix is not abandoning artificial intelligence, it is using it smarter. Choose the right sized model for the task instead of always reaching for the most powerful one. Cache repeated prompts instead of resending the same context every single time. Track your token usage weekly instead of letting it run unchecked for months. Because the era of throwing unlimited money at artificial intelligence is ending, and the businesses that survive will be the ones who learned efficiency before everyone else.
